stages.concept:
# Unit 152: as if + 가정법 과거완료 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **as if + 가정법 과거완료**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> She looked **as if** she **had seen** a ghost.
> 그녀는 마치 유령을 본 것처럼 보였다. (실제: 유령을 보지 않았다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **as if + had p.p.** — 마치 ~했던 것처럼 (과거 사실의 반대)

> He talked **as if** he **had been** there.
> 그는 마치 거기 있었던 것처럼 말했다. (실제: 가 본 적 없다)

> She smiled **as if** nothing **had happened**.
> 그녀는 마치 아무 일도 없었던 것처럼 미소 지었다.

> He acted **as if** he **had known** the secret.
> 그는 마치 비밀을 알았던 것처럼 행동했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 비교!

| as if + | 의미 | 시점 |
|------|------|------|
| 과거동사/were | 마치 ~인 것처럼 | 주절과 같은 시제 (현재 반대) |
| had p.p. | 마치 ~했던 것처럼 | 주절보다 이전 시제 (과거 반대) |

**Q. 다음 문장의 (       ) 안에서 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"He talks as if he ( read / had read ) the book before." (그는 전에 그 책을 읽었던 것처럼 말한다.)
1. read
2. had read ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정답이에요.
전에(before) 그 책을 읽었던(과거 사실) 것처럼 말하고 있으므로, 주절의 시점(현재)보다 이전의 사실을 가정하는 'as if + 가정법 과거완료(had p.p.
)' 형태인 'had read'가 올바릅니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: as if + had p.p. = 마치 ~했던 것처럼 (과거 반대)! 가정법 과거와 과거완료의 차이 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 152: as if + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
The boys hadn't won a prize.
They looked as if they (     ) a prize.
> **정답** had won

---

**02.** She hadn't been to Paris.
She talked as if she (     ) to Paris.
> **정답** had been

---

**03.** He hadn't eaten anything.
He looked as if he (     ) a lot.
> **정답** had eaten

---

**04.** She hadn't seen the movie.
She talked about it as if she (     ) it.
> **정답** had seen

---

**05.** He hadn't studied for the test.
He answered as if he (     ) hard.
> **정답** had studied

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She talked as if she saw the movie.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** saw → had seen

---

**07.** He acted as if he knew the answer.
(가정법 과거완료= 과거에 알지 못했음)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** knew → had known

---

**08.** She looked as if she was there.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** was → had been

---

**09.** He responded as if he studied the subject.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** studied → had studied

---

**10.** She cried as if she lost everything.
(가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** lost → had lost

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 마치 파리에 가본 것처럼 말했다.
She talked as if she to Paris.
> **정답** had been

---

**12.** 그는 마치 많이 먹은 것처럼 보였다.
He looked as if he a lot.
> **정답** had eaten

---

**13.** 그녀는 마치 영화를 본 것처럼 이야기했다.
She talked as if she the movie.
> **정답** had seen

---

**14.** 그는 마치 열심히 공부한 것처럼 대답했다.
He answered as if he hard.
> **정답** had studied

---

**15.** 그녀는 마치 모든 것을 잃은 것처럼 울었다.
She cried as if she everything.
> **정답** had lost

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 마치 상을 받은 것처럼 기뻐했다.
He as was happy if he had won a prize
> **정답** He / was / happy / as / if / he / had / won / a / prize

---

**17.** 그녀는 마치 그곳에 가본 것처럼 말했다.
She as talked if she had been there
> **정답** She / talked / as / if / she / had / been / there

---

**18.** 그는 마치 답을 알고 있었던 것처럼 행동했다.
He as acted if he had known the answer
> **정답** He / acted / as / if / he / had / known / the / answer

---

**19.** 그녀는 마치 많이 연습한 것처럼 연주했다.
She as played if she had practiced a lot
> **정답** She / played / as / if / she / had / practiced / a / lot

---

**20.** 그는 마치 소식을 들은 것처럼 반응했다.
He as reacted if he had heard the news
> **정답** He / reacted / as / if / he / had / heard / the / news
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 152: as if + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My little brother talks as if he __________ his
homework before the meal.
will finish
finishes
finished
had finished
> **정답** had finished

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The girl acts as if she __________ me before.
had met
would meet
met
meets
> **정답** had met

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Thomas talks as if he __________ in LA before he
came here.
had lived
lives
lived
has lived
> **정답** had lived

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She talks as if she __________ a famous writer before
he became a painter.
has been
was
had been
is
> **정답** had been

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Sophia talks as if she ______________ the cookies
herself, but her mother actually made them.
makes
had made
has made
made
> **정답** had made

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he was not a teacher.
He talks as if he were a teacher.
He talks as if he weren't a teacher.
He talks as if he had not been a teacher.
He talks as if he had been a teacher.
> **정답** He talks as if he had been a teacher.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he didn't work for the company as a director.
He pretends as if he didn't work for the
company as a director.
He pretends as if he had worked for the
company as a director.
He pretends as if he worked for the company
as a director.
He pretends as if he has worked for the
company as a director.
> **정답** He pretends as if he had worked for the company as a director.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, she didn't study abroad when she was young.
She talks as if she has studied abroad when
she was young.
She talks as if she studied abroad when she
was young.
She talks as if she had studied abroad when
she was young.
She talks as if she studies abroad when she
was young.
> **정답** She talks as if she had studied abroad when she was young.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he was responsible for the car accident.
He behaves as if he had not been responsible
for the car accident.
He behaves as if he were responsible for the
car accident.
He behaves as if he is responsible for the car
accident.
He behaves as if he had been responsible for
the car accident.
> **정답** He behaves as if he had not been responsible for the car accident.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Chris wasn't a celebrity.
Chris talks as if he had been a celebrity.
Chris talks as if he is a celebrity.
Chris talks as if he had not been a celebrity.
Chris talks as if he were a celebrity.
> **정답** Chris talks as if he had been a celebrity.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He talks as if he had not broken the glass.
Chris looked as if he knew the answer to the
question.
He behaves as if nothing happened last night.
She talks as if she were very close to Julia.
> **정답** He behaves as if nothing happened last night.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Sujin talked as if she read the book before.
My son behaves as if he knew all about life.
Paul looks as if he had had a bad dream last
night.
They talked as if they had visited New York
last month.
> **정답** Sujin talked as if she read the book before.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Brian talks as if had been a soldier, but he was
not a soldier.
She said to me as if she had met BTS before.
The player behaved as if he had not touched
the ball.
She says to me as if she had no worries at that
time.
> **정답** She says to me as if she had no worries at that time.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그는 자기가 그 회의에 참석했던 것처럼 말했다.
He talked as if he joined the meeting.
He talked as if he had not joined the meeting.
He talked as if he had joined the meeting.
He talked as if he didn't join the meeting.
> **정답** He talked as if he had joined the meeting.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 자기가 그 대학을 다녔던 것처럼 말한다.
She talked as if she had attended the college.
She talks as if she didn't attend the college.
She talks as if she had not attended the
college.
She talks as if she had attended the college.
> **정답** She talks as if she had attended the college.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그는 마치 자기가 그 회사의 CEO이었던 것처럼 행동했다.
He acted as if he had not been the CEO of the
company.
He acted as if he had been the CEO of the
company.
He acts as if he were the CEO of the company.
He acts as if he weren't the CEO of the
company.
> **정답** He acted as if he had been the CEO of the company.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Sally pretends as if she had completed the
task.
Chris talked as if he had known everything.
Jack talks as if he were a professional baseball
player when he was young.
Steven spends money as if he were a very rich
person.
> **정답** Jack talks as if he were a professional baseball player when he was young.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Brad talks as if he had been the winner of the
speech contest.
My sister behaved as if she were my mother
when I was a kid.
They continued the conversation as if nothing
had happened yesterday.
The boy jumped up as if he had seen a ghost.
> **정답** My sister behaved as if she were my mother when I was a kid.

---

**19.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Michael didn't live in New York, did he?
B: No, he didn't. But
____________________________________________.
he talked as if he live in New York when he
was young
he talked as if he lived in New York when he
was young
he talked as if he hadn't lived in New York
when he was young
he talked as if he had lived in New York when
he was young
> **정답** he talked as if he had lived in New York when he was young

---

**20.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Did Paul know your sister before he met her?
B: No, But
_____________________________________.
he acts as if he knows her before
he acts as if he has known her before
he acts as if he knew her before
he acts as if he had known her before
> **정답** he acts as if he had known her before
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 152 as if + 가정법 과거완료중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 통하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
In fact, he didn't play basketball well when he was
young.
→ He talks as if he  (     )   (     )   (     )  
when he was young.
정답 had, played, basketball, well

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 통하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
In fact, she didn't have a great holiday.
→ She appears as if she  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 had, had, a, great, holiday

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 통하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
In fact, I didn't know the truth about the issue.
→ They talk as if I  (     )   (     )   (     )  
about the issue.
정답 had, known, the, truth

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 통하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
In fact, she hadn't reviewed the lesson after the
class.
→ She talked as if she  (     )   (     )  
 after the class.
정답 had, reviewed, the, lesson

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 마치 시험 공부를 했던 것처럼 말한다.
힌트 (     ) study for the exam
She talks  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 as, if (though), she, had, studied, for, the, exam

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 그 사고에 책임이 없던 것처럼 행동했다.
힌트 (     ) be responsible for the accident
He behaved  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 as, if (though), he, had, not, been, responsible, for,
the, accident

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
John은 마치 정답을 알고 있는 체 했다.
힌트 (     ) know the correct answer
John pretended  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 as, if (though), he, had, known, the, correct, answer

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 마치 전에 서울에서 살았던 것처럼 말한다.
힌트 (     ) live in Seoul
He talks  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )  before.
정답 as, if (though), he, had, lived, in, Seoul

---

**09.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
She acts as if nothing happened between them
last night.
→ She acts as if  (     )  between them
last night.
정답 nothing had happened

---

**10.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Jake talks as if he visited France last year.
→ Jake talks as if
 last year.
정답 he had visited France

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 152: as if + 가정법 과거완료 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My little sister talks as if she __________ her project before the deadline.
will finish finishes finished had finished
> 정답: had finished

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The boy acts as if he __________ me before. had met would meet met meets
> 정답: had met

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy talks as if she __________ in London before she came here. had lived lives lived has lived
> 정답: had lived

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He talks as if he __________ a famous chef before he became a teacher. has been was had been is
> 정답: had been

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom talks as if he ______________ the cake himself, but his sister actually baked it.
makes had made has made made
> 정답: had made

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, she was not a nurse.
She talks as if she were a nurse.
She talks as if she weren't a nurse.
She talks as if she had not been a nurse.
She talks as if she had been a nurse.
> 정답: She talks as if she had been a nurse.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he didn't work for the school as a principal.
He pretends as if he didn't work for the school as a principal.
He pretends as if he had worked for the school as a principal.
He pretends as if he worked for the school as a principal.
He pretends as if he has worked for the school as a principal.
> 정답: He pretends as if he had worked for the school as a director.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, he didn't travel abroad when he was young.
He talks as if he has traveled abroad when he was young.
He talks as if he traveled abroad when he was young.
He talks as if he had traveled abroad when he was young.
He talks as if he travels abroad when he was young.
> 정답: He talks as if he had traveled abroad when he was

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, she was responsible for the mistake.
She behaves as if she had not been responsible for the mistake.
She behaves as if she were responsible for the mistake.
She behaves as if she is responsible for the mistake.
She behaves as if she had been responsible for the mistake.
> 정답: She behaves as if she had not been responsible for the car accident.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
In fact, Amy wasn't a model.
Amy talks as if she had been a model.
Amy talks as if she is a model.
Amy talks as if she had not been a model.
Amy talks as if she were a model.
> 정답: Amy talks as if she had been a model.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He talks as if he had not broken the window.
Amy looked as if she knew the answer to the question.
He behaves as if nothing happened last week.
She talks as if she were very close to Tom.
> 정답: He behaves as if nothing happened last week.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Amy talked as if she read the article before.
My son behaves as if he knew all about the world.
Tom looks as if he had had a bad experience last month.
They talked as if they had visited Paris last summer.
> 정답: Amy talked as if she read the article before.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Tom talks as if had been a pilot, but he was not a pilot.
She said to me as if she had met the actor before.
The athlete behaved as if he had not fouled the opponent.
She says to me as if she had no worries at that time.
> 정답: She says to me as if she had no worries at that time.

---
